sn22.68:1.1:
1
Sāvatthinidānaṁ. Atha kho aññataro bhikkhu … pe … ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "sādhu me, bhante, bhagavā saṅkhittena dhammaṁ desetu … pe … ātāpī pahitatto vihareyyan"ti. "Yo kho, bhikkhu, anattā; tatra te chando pahātabbo"ti. "Aññātaṁ, bhagavā, aññātaṁ, sugatā"ti.
